overall.description: Nighttime driving sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling along a wet coastal highway with rocky cliffs and palm trees, transitioning from natural terrain to an urban cityscape with distinctive horizontal LED street lights and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway curve with rocky cliff and palm tree

events.description: vehicle accelerates from slow speed onto the main highway curve
white sedan overtakes on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: navigating a curved highway at night with wet reflective road conditions, maintaining right lane position

notable_agents.action: white sedan overtaking on the left side, moving in the same direction

entered.detail: smooth concrete barrier with horizontal lines separating the road from elevated terrain
large natural rock formation with warm uplighting illuminating the textured surface
tall palm tree silhouetted against the dark sky near the curve
futuristic horizontal LED light bar on curved pole, emitting bright white light
painted yellow concrete curb separating the road from the sidewalk area

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a curved coastal highway at night, passing a concrete retaining wall and illuminated rocky cliff face on the left. A distinctive horizontal LED streetlight stands on the right while a white sedan overtakes on the left. The wet asphalt reflects the artificial lighting, and a lone palm tree marks the curve ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: straight highway section with illuminated rock face

events.description: red sports car overtakes at high speed on the right side
black sedan passes on the left side heading in the same direction

agents.ego_description: cruising along straight highway section with illuminated rock face on left, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: red sports car overtaking rapidly on the right side with headlights bright

entered.detail: metal guardrail with reflective strips running along the right side of the road
faint orange and blue lights visible on the horizon indicating distant urban area

segments.scene_description: The highway straightens out with an illuminated rocky cliff face on the left and guardrails on the right. Multiple vehicles overtake including a red sports car on the right. The distinctive horizontal LED streetlights continue overhead, and a faint city glow becomes visible on the distant horizon through the hazy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass approach with construction yard

events.description: approaching underpass structure with construction yard visible on left
passing yellow construction truck parked on left shoulder near underpass entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through an underpass section, slowing slightly for the curve

notable_agents.action: yellow construction truck parked stationary on the left shoulder near the underpass entrance

entered.detail: large concrete overpass bridge creating a covered section of highway ahead
lit entrance to a construction or service area with equipment visible inside
large yellow utility truck parked beside the construction yard entrance
white painted text on the road surface reading SLOW

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a semi-covered underpass structure with a construction yard entrance on the left where a yellow truck is parked. The road markings indicate SLOW as the vehicle passes beneath the concrete overpass. The lighting shifts to a mix of artificial street lights and the shadow of the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding coastal highway with emerging city skyline

events.description: exiting underpass into open highway with city skyline becoming visible ahead
red sedan overtakes on the left while navigating the curve

agents.ego_description: navigating winding highway curves with the city skyline emerging in the distance, maintaining lane position through the turns

notable_agents.action: red sedan overtaking on the left side while navigating the highway curve

entered.detail: cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings and towers visible on the horizon ahead
group of palm trees lining the right side of the winding road

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the highway opens into a winding coastal road with dense palm trees on the right. The city skyline becomes prominently visible in the distance, with illuminated skyscrapers piercing the hazy night sky. A red sedan overtakes on the left as the vehicle navigates the curves toward the urban center.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to dense urban district

events.description: city buildings become prominent and detailed as the vehicle approaches the urban core
black SUV overtakes on the left approaching the final curve into the city

agents.ego_description: approaching the urban core with tall buildings and dense infrastructure visible ahead, navigating the final curves into the city

notable_agents.action: black SUV overtaking on the left as the road curves toward the city center

entered.detail: tall modern skyscrapers with illuminated windows forming the dense city center ahead
cluster of futuristic glass and steel towers with neon lighting visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the final curve into the dense urban district, with towering glass skyscrapers and neon-lit buildings now dominating the view ahead. The highway guardrails end as the road transitions into the city proper. A black SUV overtakes on the left while the distinctive horizontal streetlights continue to illuminate the wet asphalt leading into the futuristic metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a wet coastal highway that gradually transitions from a rugged natural shoreline into a dense, neon-lit futuristic metropolis. It begins by navigating a curved road beside illuminated rocky cliffs and a lone palm tree, with the wet asphalt reflecting the glow of distinctive horizontal LED streetlights. As the highway straightens, the camera passes several overtaking vehicles while a faint city glow emerges through the hazy night air on the distant horizon. The scene then shifts through the shadows of a concrete underpass and a construction yard before opening back up into a winding road lined with dense palm trees and a prominently visible skyline of piercing skyscrapers. Finally, the road curves sharply into the urban district, where towering glass buildings and neon lights dominate the view as the vehicle enters the heart of the city.
